items.briefing:
Australian critical infrastructure operators are being urged to review and tighten router security following warnings about Russian cyber activity targeting network devices. Security experts are also reminding organisations that attackers may already be inside your network — so detection and response plans are just as important as prevention.

On a positive note, Australia's newly announced National Office of AI has been broadly welcomed by the tech and security industry, with the Australian Computer Society calling for a focus on building AI skills and professional recognition.

**Practical tip:** Check that your office routers and network devices are running the latest firmware and have default passwords changed.

featured.title: Australian critical infrastructure urged to tighten router security after Russian cyber warning
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure routers targeted by Russian hackers poses direct threat to Australian national security.
